text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I team up with Mejiro Ryan, an Umamusume
dedicated to strength training, and we decide to
take on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan envies Mejiro McQueen, the most
talented racer in the Mejiro family, and desires
nothing more than to beat her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that goal in mind, we commence our journey
together.
